name: revit_search_parameters
description: Search element parameter values in the current view, selection, or project for a given string with optional category, parameter, and regex filters.

search_string.description: Text or regular expression to find in parameter values

category.description: BuiltInCategory name to limit search, or '*' for all categories

parameter_name.description: Parameter name to search, or '*' for all parameters

match_case.description: Require exact character case when matching

whole_word.description: Require the search string to match the entire parameter value

regex.description: Treat search_string as a .NET regular expression

built_in_params.description: Search BuiltInParameter values via the API instead of visible parameters

element_types.description: Include element types (wall types, family symbols, etc.)

element_instances.description: Include element instances (walls, family instances, etc.)

notes: Current implementation uses SearchForm and SearchHitNavigator dialogs. Refactor to accept arguments directly and return structured hits for headless MCP execution.
